about.title: About MagellAIn
about.subtitle: Sailing Intelligence for Great Lakes Racers
about.description: MagellAIn is a sailing intelligence platform that combines real-time weather and water data, AI-powered coaching, race management, analytics, GPS track recording and replay, offline support, and safety features into a single app designed for racing sailors on Lake Erie and the Detroit River.
about.builtFor: Ford Yacht Club, West Shore Sail Club, and the DRYA racing community

features.title: Live Marine Data
features.summary: Real-time NOAA weather, NDBC buoy observations, and GLERL lake data, all displayed on interactive nautical charts.
features.details: Wind speed and direction, wave height, water temperature, and marine forecasts updated continuously from official government sources. NOAA electronic nautical chart overlays show depths, markers, and hazards. Active weather alerts (Small Craft Advisories, Gale Warnings) appear as prominent banners on the Home and Weather screens.

features.title: AI Sailing Coach
features.summary: A Claude-powered assistant that knows your boat, your waters, and racing strategy — with voice input support.
features.details: Ask about tactics, sail trim, weather interpretation, racing rules, or post-race analysis. The coach factors in current conditions, your boat specs, and local knowledge about Lake Erie and Detroit River sailing patterns. Tap the microphone button to ask hands-free using voice — interim transcription appears in real time so you can review before sending.

features.title: GPS Track Recording
features.summary: Record your track on the water with live speed, distance, and time stats.
features.details: The GPS Tracker panel on the Map screen lets you start recording your position, speed (in knots), and heading using your device GPS. Live stats show elapsed time, current speed, total nautical miles, and max speed. Tracks save to your account when signed in, or to local device storage for offline use.

features.title: Track Replay
features.summary: Replay any saved GPS track on the map with animated playback and variable speed.
features.details: Open the Track Replay panel from the Route icon on the map to see all your saved sessions. Select any track to draw the full route in orange on the chart. Play, Pause, or Stop the animated dot as it moves through your recorded positions. Choose 1x, 5x, 20x, or 50x playback speed to review a two-hour race in seconds. Track replay is available for both Supabase-synced and locally stored tracks.

features.title: Race Management and Analytics
features.summary: Club schedules, results, series standings, CSV result import, and head-to-head performance all in one place.
features.details: View upcoming and past races from Ford YC, West Shore SC, and DRYA series. Import race results from any CSV export (YachtScoring, PHRF-LE, or spreadsheet) using the four-step wizard: upload, column mapping, race selection, and preview. The Performance screen shows your race history, season trend chart, series standings, and head-to-head competitor records. Export your race log and standings as a PDF directly from the app.

features.title: Offline Support
features.summary: The app stays functional when you lose signal — cached pages, offline GPS tracking, and an offline indicator.
features.details: A service worker caches all five main screens and recently loaded data so you can keep using MagellAIn underway without a connection. GPS track recording works fully offline, saving to local storage until sync is available. An amber banner appears at the top of the screen when offline and clears automatically when you reconnect. NOAA weather and buoy data remains available from cache for up to one hour after the last fetch.

features.title: Safety First
features.summary: Emergency USCG contact, float plans, and weather alert banners.
features.details: One-tap emergency button displays your GPS coordinates and connects to USCG Sector Detroit. File digital float plans pre-filled with your vessel details before heading out. Active NOAA weather alerts appear as prominent banners on the Home and Weather screens whenever conditions warrant caution.

features.title: Built for the Water
features.summary: Clean, one-handed mobile interface that works when conditions are tough.
features.details: Designed for use on a wet, moving boat with one hand. Large touch targets, high-contrast dark and light display themes, and voice input when your hands are full. No clutter, no distractions — a professional tool for serious sailors.

dataSources.name: NOAA / NWS

dataSources.name: GLERL

dataSources.name: YachtScoring

legal.disclaimer: MagellAIn is a decision-support tool, not a substitute for seamanship, proper safety equipment, or sound judgment. Weather data is sourced from NOAA and may be delayed. Always monitor VHF Channel 16 and carry required safety gear. The emergency feature connects to USCG but does not replace a VHF radio or EPIRB.
legal.dataAttribution: Weather and marine data provided by the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA), National Weather Service (NWS), National Data Buoy Center (NDBC), and the Great Lakes Environmental Research Laboratory (GLERL).
